name: pubmed_search
description: Search PubMed for peer-reviewed biomedical literature. Returns titles, abstracts, journal names, PMIDs, and URLs. Use for understanding the science behind a topic — mechanisms, efficacy evidence, review articles, and meta-analyses. Pair with clinicaltrials_search to get both published evidence and ongoing trial data.

query.description: Search query. Use plain keywords for broad searches (e.g., 'CAR-T solid tumors efficacy'). For precision, use PubMed field tags: [ti] title, [mh] MeSH terms, [tiab] title/abstract, [dp] date. Boolean AND/OR/NOT supported.
